text:
Optimus Prime is an Autobot from the ' series. He is the leader of the Autobots and, he scanned Evangelion Unit-01 and gained its colors and size to defeat Angel-Scream.

Profie

Optimus Prime: Mode Eva is an Autobot that, after scanning the EVA-01, has acquired an appearance as imposing as an Evangelion, wearing the colors of Unit-01. His cabin is mainly purple, associated with green forearms. The distinctive element of this shape is that the bust of Optimus Prime: EVA Mode can open and reveal the the Matrix of Leader with colors similar to the core of the EVA, while his right arm can transform into an energetic axe of reddish hue.

In this form, Optimus Prime retains his personality, intellect, and ability to develop plans and strategies. In addition, he maintains his ability to communicate verbally. On the other hand, unlike the Evangelions, he is not able to use an A.T. Field.

Transformers Mode "EVA"

Aboard Sky Lynx, Optimus Prime and the Autobots arrive in Tokyo-3 to help defeat an Angel and prevent a new Second Impact. However, they are confronted with the ghost of fire Starscream who, possessed by the Angel, thus takes the form of Angel-Scream.

At the NERV, Misato Katsuragi orders the deployment of the Evangelion Unit-01 and the withdrawal of the city. Optimus Prime is impressed by human technology and more when he finds himself facing the EVA. Intuitively, Optimus scans the EVA-01 and transforms to adopt its appearance and size, thus becoming Optimus Prime: EVA Mode. Now able to fight against Starscream, Optimus is preparing for confrontation with his enemy.

Angel-Scream attacks Unit-01 with an energy shot, but Optimus Prime protects it and retaliates with its blaster. However, the enemy deploys an A.T. Field to defend himself. The Angel-Transformers throws himself on Optimus, grabbing his throat to lift him. Angel-Scream wants to kill the leader of the Autobots in order to become the leader of the Decepticons and conquer the universe. He attacks Optimus' helmet until he cracks it. The other Transformers try to help their leader, but they are powerless in the face of the disproportionate size of the Angel. It is then that Wheeljack picks up a radio signal from Misato. She tells them that Unit-01 no longer reacts and entrusts them with the fate of the fight, by communicating them a strategy.

Bumblebee provokes Angel-Scream by turning in circles around his feet. The Angel tries to crush him, but loses his balance and falls. Taking advantage of this opportunity, Misato activates the transformation of the Tokyo-3 buildings to keep the enemy on the ground. Optimus manages to free himself from Angel-Scream's grip and gives him a punch that fails to break his A.T. Field. He then changes his strategy and uses his Energon axe, finally managing to reach his opponent. Optimus breaks the Angel-Scream core that explodes into a sheaf of blood.

Several hours after the battle, Optimus Prime regains his normal size and joins a NERV military camp. He is informed that other Decepticons may come by having merged with Angels. The Transformers decide to stay to help the NERV in its struggle. https://tfwiki.net/wiki/Optimus_Prime_(G1)#Transformers_.C3.97_Evangelion
